Article Title: NBA trade rumor: Bronny James could become father LeBron James' on-court rival under latest Lakers speculation
Article Text:
Bronny James. Image via: Brett Davis-Imagn Images

Lakers reportedly have a major decision on Bronny James



Detail



Status



Player



Bronny James, G



Current team



Los Angeles Lakers



Contract status



Guaranteed through 2026-27



Team option



2027-28



Trade status



Unresolved, no deal reported





What are insiders saying about Bronny James?



Why are the Lakers not willing to trade Bronny James?



Bronny James' salary cap and contract details



Lebron James and Bronny James in action (Image via Getty Images)

Season



Salary/Status



2026-27



$2.3 million (fully guaranteed)



2027-28



Team option



Draft position



No. 55 overall, 2024





Bronny James, 21, remains under contract with the Los Angeles Lakers on a guaranteed $2.3 million salary for 2026-27, even after father LeBron James informed the team he won't return following eight seasons. The Athletic's Dan Woike reports the Lakers view Bronny's roster spot as independent of LeBron's decision. Bronny attended the Lakers Summer League and is part of the team's veteran minicamp, which began this week.LeBron James spent eight seasons wearing purple and gold, but Bronny James might outlast him there. The younger James remains under contract with the Los Angeles Lakers even after his father informed the franchise he plans to sign elsewhere for the 2026-27 season.It has scrambled the assumption that Bronny would simply follow LeBron out the door. Multiple reports now suggest the Lakers see Bronny's future as separate from his father's decision entirely, and the front office's actions back that up.No trade has materialized, and the Lakers already made a defining move: they declined to waive Bronny on June 29, locking in his salary guarantee one day before LeBron's departure became official.Front Office Sports reported that rival executives have discussed acquiring Bronny as a potential sweetener to help lure LeBron, but that interest reflects other franchises' internal conversations, not the Lakers' intentions.The Athletic's Dan Woike has been the most direct voice cutting against the trade chatter. He described the assumption that father and son will stay linked going forward as false, based on league sources briefed on Lakers front-office strategy.Woike also noted that Bronny might be too advanced for the G League as he enters his third professional season. One Western Conference executive told Front Office Sports, "We wouldn't be doing our jobs if we didn't discuss it," when asked about trade interest in Bronny.Bronny's inclusion in the Lakers' veteran minicamp, rather than being parked exclusively with the Summer League roster, is the clearest signal of intent. Teams don't typically fold a player they plan to waive or flip into their development program for the coming season.Bronny also improved defensively and expanded his shooting sample size across his first two years, giving the coaching staff reason to keep charting his progress rather than moving him for a marginal asset. With a crowded backcourt now including Luka Doncic, Austin Reaves, Quentin Grimes, Collin Sexton and rookie Cameron Carr, the Lakers still view him as a low-cost depth piece worth developing rather than discarding.Bronny's rookie-scale deal makes him one of the cheapest roster spots the Lakers control, which matters for a front office still managing its books after guaranteeing Austin Reaves a four-year, $180 million extension this offseason. A cost-controlled guard with team-option flexibility through 2028 is easy to hold onto even without a father-son storyline attached.LeBron has not confirmed his next destination, though Cleveland has emerged as the reported frontrunner for a third stint with the franchise. Until he signs, the Lakers have no obligation to make a final call on Bronny, and nothing reported so far suggests they're in a hurry to.
Article Summary: Bronny james, 21, remains under contract with the los angeles lakers on a guaranteed $2.3 million salary for 2026-27. Lebron james informed the team he won't return following eight seasons. The athletic's dan woike reports the lakers view bronny's roster spot as independent of lebron's decision.

Article Title: “Three boyfriends in the last eight years": Jude Bellingham's girlfriend Ashlyn Castro's reported Michael B. Jordan romance resurfaces
Article Text:
Jude Bellingham's girlfriend, Ashlyn Castro, has gained attention during the 2026 World Cup, but she was already familiar to celebrity watchers through her reported romance with Michael B. Jordan in 2017. The American model and influencer was later linked to Bellingham in 2025. She has also denied dating rumors surrounding her personal life, insisting she has had only "three boyfriends over the last eight years" despite ongoing online speculation.

Ashlyn Castro's reported Michael B. Jordan romance put her in the spotlight

Ashlyn Castro and Jude Bellingham continue to attract attention during the World Cup

Jude Bellingham’s World Cup performances have kept football fans talking but the England star is not the only one drawing attention. His girlfriend, American model Ashlyn Castro, has been a familiar face in the crowd, cheering him on during the tournament. Her romance with Bellingham continues to make headlines, but Castro was already a celebrity in celebrity circles years before meeting him, following a reported romance with Hollywood star Michael B. Jordan Before her association with Jude Bellingham, Ashlyn Castro built a career as a model, influencer and content creator. She was born in California on December 17, 1997 and is 28 years old and has worked with big fashion brands like Pretty Little Thing and appeared in DJ Khaled’s 2021 music video for Popstar. Her social media presence has also grown, amassing more than 650,000 followers on Instagram.But one of the first moments that catapulted Castro into the celebrity spotlight happened at the end of 2017 when she was linked to Oscar-winning actor Michael B. Jordan.The pair were photographed together at a private event in Los Angeles, with Castro sitting on the actor's lap. Reports later claimed they also spent New Year's Eve together before eventually going their separate ways in late 2018.Neither publicly discussed the relationship in detail, but the speculation introduced Castro to entertainment headlines well before football fans knew her name.Since then, she has largely focused on her career while maintaining a relatively private personal life despite growing public interest.Castro and Bellingham were first linked in early 2025 after she was spotted watching a Real Madrid match alongside the footballer's parents. Although reports suggested the pair met through the celebrity dating app Raya, neither has confirmed how their relationship began.A source previously told The Mirror that Castro was well prepared for the attention that comes with dating one of football's biggest stars because of her previous experience around celebrities. According to the source, "With several years of experience in the world of A-listers, she understands how to maintain intrigue while keeping her private life private."Her relationship has not escaped online rumors. Earlier this year, social media users speculated that Castro had been unfaithful to Bellingham after she was linked to Atlanta Hawks player Terance Mann. Mann quickly dismissed the claims."Ashlyn is cool, people. I don't know why everybody is on her head about anything. She's cool. Me and Ash are cool."He also urged people to stop feeding false narratives and said they should “calm the narrative down.”Castro herself later spoke about the ongoing speculation, batting back at the online gossip about her dating history, saying she’d had “three boyfriends in the last eight years.”Interest in Bellingham’s personal life has only grown as he has continued to shine for England on the biggest stage in football. But despite the headlines about her past, Castro has largely opted to stay out of the public eye, preferring to cheer on the Real Madrid and England midfielder from the stands.
Article Summary: Ashlyn castro was first linked to jude bellingham in 2025. The model and influencer was previously linked to hollywood actor michael b. jordan. She has largely stayed out of the public eye during the world cup. Castro has denied dating rumors, saying she has had three boyfriends.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: San Francisco 49ers and Dallas Cowboys linked to $106M Las Vegas Raiders star
Article Text:
Raiders Trade Rumor: San Francisco 49ers and Dallas Cowboys linked to $106M Las Vegas Raiders star(Getty)

Category



Details



Player



Maxx Crosby



Current Team



Las Vegas Raiders



Contract



Three years, $106.5 million



Potential Landing Spot



San Francisco 49ers, Dallas Cowboys



Latest Insider Update



Brad Gagnon of Bleacher Report suggested the 49ers could be a trade fit for Crosby.



Potential Return



Veteran receiver, premium draft picks, or a young player depending on the trade package



Contract Status



Under contract with the Raiders through the 2029 season





Which teams are interested in Maxx Crosby?

What are insiders saying about the NFL trade rumor?

Contract details and implications

Why could the San Francisco 49ers or Dallas Cowboys make sense?

The latest NFL trade rumor has once again put Las Vegas Raiders star Maxx Crosby at the center of speculation ahead of training camp. While the Raiders signed Crosby to a three-year, $106.5 million extension in 2025, one NFL analyst believes the San Francisco 49ers could become a serious trade destination if the situation changes during the season.The latest Raiders trade rumor links Maxx Crosby with the San Francisco 49ers if the Raiders decide to move him later this year. Brad Gagnon of Bleacher Report believes San Francisco could pursue the five-time Pro Bowler to strengthen its defensive front.The report comes even though Crosby recently signed a new contract with Las Vegas. There is no indication that the Raiders are actively shopping him, but trade speculation continues because of the team's long-term rebuilding plans.Last Word on Sports also listed the Dallas Cowboys as another possible destination. That proposal was not based on insider reporting, but on how well Crosby could fit in Dallas if the Raiders eventually listened to offers.Brad Gagnon believes San Francisco has a reason to explore adding another elite pass rusher despite already having Nick Bosa. Pairing the two could give the 49ers one of the league's strongest defensive lines.Last Word on Sports writer Anthony Palacios also explored several hypothetical trade packages. Among them was a proposal involving the Cowboys, who were previously linked with Crosby earlier in the offseason. Palacios suggested Dallas could build an offer around draft picks and young talent if Las Vegas ever became open to negotiations.For now, though, there has been no report suggesting the Raiders are actively discussing a trade.Maxx Crosby signed a three-year, $106.5 million extension with the Las Vegas Raiders in 2025. The deal includes $91.5 million in guarantees and keeps him under contract through the 2029 season. He is scheduled to earn a $30 million base salary in 2026 while carrying a cap hit of nearly $35.8 million.Because of that contract, any team interested in Crosby would likely need to offer significant draft compensation or established players. Unless the Raiders decide to change direction during the season, moving one of the NFL's best pass rushers would not be an easy decision.The San Francisco 49ers have consistently built their defense around an elite pass rush. Adding Maxx Crosby alongside Nick Bosa would give San Francisco another proven game-changing edge rusher as it pushes for another Super Bowl.The Dallas Cowboys could also make sense if they decide to make another aggressive move before the trade deadline. Crosby would give Dallas another elite defender to pair with its current front and strengthen a defense built around creating pressure.At this stage, the Raiders have not indicated that Crosby is available. Still, with training camp approaching and trade rumors continuing around the league, his name remains one to watch if Las Vegas decides to reshape its roster later in the season.
Article Summary: The latest raiders trade rumor links maxx crosby with the san francisco 49ers if the raiders decide to move him later this year. Brad gagnon of bleacher report believes san francisco could pursue the five-time pro bowler to strengthen its defensive front.

Article Title: Seahawks face a $51 million Rashid Shaheed dilemma that could reshape their receiving corps before training camp
Article Text:
Seattle Seahawks NFL (Getty Images)

Why could Rashid Shaheed become a much bigger part of Seattle's offense?

How does Brian Fleury's offense fit Rashid Shaheed's strengths?

Should the Seahawks reduce Rashid Shaheed's return duties?

The Seattle Seahawks already know Rashid Shaheed can change games on special teams. What remains uncertain is how much more they can ask from him on offense without reducing the impact that made him such a valuable addition. After signing Shaheed to a multiyear, $51 million contract following last season's Super Bowl run, Seattle enters training camp with a different challenge. The focus is no longer on whether he belongs in the offense. It is about finding the right balance between expanding his workload as a receiver and protecting one of the league's most dangerous return specialists.The Athletic recently identified Shaheed as Seattle's top breakout candidate for 2026, but the prediction is not built on the idea that he will suddenly become a classic No. 1 receiver. Instead, it reflects the belief that the Seahawks have yet to unlock everything he can offer within their offense.Seattle traded for Shaheed from the New Orleans Saints in November 2025, giving up fourth and fifth-round draft picks before committing to him with a long-term extension in March. His production after arriving was solid rather than spectacular. He finished with 15 catches for 188 yards across nine regular-season games while adding seven rushing attempts for 64 yards.Those numbers tell only part of the story.Shaheed brings a skill set that neither Jaxon Smith-Njigba nor Cooper Kupp fully provides. Smith-Njigba has developed into the focal point of Seattle's passing game, while Kupp remains one of the league's smartest route runners despite dealing with injuries over recent seasons.Shaheed stretches defenses differently. His speed forces safeties to respect the deep ball, creating more space underneath for teammates. Seattle also has the flexibility to manufacture touches through jet sweeps, motion and quick passes rather than relying solely on vertical routes. His 31-yard jet sweep late last season offered a glimpse of how dangerous he can be when the offense creates opportunities beyond traditional passing concepts.New offensive coordinator Brian Fleury inherits an offense that already suits Shaheed's strengths.After spending seven years with the San Francisco 49ers, Fleury has made it clear he wants his offense to be "fast, violent and aggressive." At the same time, he has stressed that he does not intend to abandon the foundation established under Klint Kubiak.That continuity matters.Shaheed already understands many of the movement-based concepts introduced by Kubiak, who also coached him in New Orleans. Instead of rebuilding his role, Fleury can expand it by placing him in more creative situations before the snap.Although Seattle's depth chart lists Shaheed behind Cooper Kupp at one receiver position, that designation may not accurately reflect his weekly impact. Modern offenses depend less on static alignments and more on creating favorable matchups through motion and personnel groupings.If Fleury regularly deploys Shaheed alongside Kupp and Smith-Njigba, Seattle gains another way to stress opposing defenses without dramatically changing its offensive identity.A larger offensive role naturally creates another question that could shape Seattle's season.In 12 appearances, including the playoffs, Shaheed returned three kicks for touchdowns, highlighted by a 95-yard kickoff return that set the tone in Seattle's divisional playoff win over San Francisco. Few players in the NFL offer that kind of game-changing ability on special teams.At the same time, asking him to handle a growing offensive workload while continuing as both the primary kickoff and punt returner carries obvious risks over a full 17-game season.Seattle's coaching staff now faces a difficult choice. Removing him from return duties would take away one of the team's biggest weapons. Leaving everything on his plate could increase wear and limit his availability when games matter most.That decision may ultimately define Shaheed's season as much as his receiving numbers. He does not need to reach 1,000 receiving yards for the breakout label to fit. If he becomes a dependable third option, consistently creates explosive plays and continues forcing defenses to account for his speed, Seattle's investment will already look justified.
Article Summary: The seattle seahawks signed rashid shaheed to a multiyear, $51 million contract. Shaheed can change games on special teams, but how much more can they ask of him? New offensive coordinator brian fleury inherits an offense that already suits shaheed's strengths.

Article Title: Lamine Yamal scripts European football history after France win with record no one has ever matched
Article Text:
Spain's Lamine Yamal (19) reacts during the World Cup round of 16 soccer match between Portugal and Spain in Arlington, Texas, near Dallas, Monday, July 6, 2026. (AP Photo/Tony Gutierrez)

Twelve starts, twelve wins: a record no European player has matched

Euro 2024 announced Yamal to the world

World Cup campaign has showcased a different side of his game

Spain's Lamine Yamal celebrates after scoring his side's opening goal during the World Cup Group H soccer match between Spain and Saudi Arabia in Atlanta, Sunday, June 21, 2026. (AP Photo/Erik S.Lesser)

More than goals and assists

Spain's march into the 2026 FIFA World Cup final has produced another remarkable milestone for teenage sensation Lamine Yamal. La Roja's 2-0 victory over France in the semi-finals ensured that every one of Yamal's 12 starts across the FIFA World Cup and UEFA European Championship has ended in victory, giving him a perfect 100 percent winning record when named in Spain's starting XI at the two biggest international tournaments. No European player has ever started as many World Cup and European Championship matches while maintaining an unblemished record, underlining the extraordinary impact the Barcelona forward has already made before even reaching his 20th birthday.International football rarely allows room for perfection, particularly at major tournaments where every knockout match can define a generation.Yet Yamal has achieved precisely that.Spain's victory over France in Dallas marked his 12th career start across the UEFA European Championship and FIFA World Cup combined. All 12 have ended in Spanish victories, giving the teenager a flawless 12-0 record whenever he has been selected from the opening whistle.It is the best 100 percent winning record ever recorded by a European player across the two competitions when starting matches.The statistic reflects more than individual brilliance. Across those 12 starts, Spain have consistently produced their best football with Yamal on the right flank, where his movement, ball retention and creativity have become central to Luis de la Fuente's attacking structure.The remarkable sequence began during UEFA Euro 2024. Fresh from his breakthrough season with Barcelona, Yamal established himself as one of the tournament's standout performers as Spain won the European Championship with a perfect seven victories from seven matches.He started six matches during that campaign, contributing one goal and four assists.His defining moment came in the semi-final against France, where his spectacular long-range strike levelled the contest before Spain completed the comeback. Days later, he helped create the opening goal for Nico Williams in Spain's 2-1 victory over England in the final.Those performances transformed him from one of Europe's brightest prospects into one of world football's biggest stars, culminating in an astonishing second-place finish in the Ballon d'Or voting at just 18 years of age.Yamal arrived at the 2026 World Cup after recovering from a hamstring injury suffered in April, an issue that disrupted his preparations for the tournament.While his individual numbers have been more modest than those of Golden Boot contenders Kylian Mbappé and Lionel Messi, or England midfielder Jude Bellingham, his influence has remained unmistakable.He has started all six of Spain's World Cup matches, taking his overall tally to 12 consecutive winning starts at major tournaments.His only goal of the tournament came against Saudi Arabia, when he opened the scoring in Spain's 4-0 victory. The strike made him the youngest player to score the opening goal in a World Cup match since Pelé in 1958, while also making him Spain's second-youngest World Cup goalscorer behind Gavi.Opponents have increasingly committed multiple defenders to containing the Barcelona winger, limiting his direct goal contributions but creating valuable space for teammates.That influence was evident again in the semi-final against France. Yamal's intelligent run into the penalty area drew Lucas Digne into the foul that allowed Mikel Oyarzabal to convert the opening penalty before Pedro Porro sealed a 2-0 victory in the second half.Across his 12 starts at the World Cup and European Championship, Yamal has contributed two goals and four assists.His broader impact, however, extends well beyond those numbers.At Euro 2024, he was Spain's primary creative outlet, while at the World Cup he has increasingly become the player around whom opponents reshape their entire defensive structure. His ability to attract double teams has opened central spaces for players such as Dani Olmo, Pedro Porro and Mikel Oyarzabal to exploit.Spain's latest victory also extended the national team's unbeaten run to 37 matches, equalling Italy's all-time European record, while making La Roja the first European nation ever to win eight consecutive knockout matches across the World Cup and European Championship.As Spain prepare for the World Cup final, Yamal will not only be chasing the biggest trophy of his career. He will also be attempting to preserve one of international football's most remarkable records—a perfect 12 victories from 12 starts on the biggest stages the sport has to offer.
Article Summary: Lamine yamal has made 12 starts at the fifa world cup and uefa european championship combined. All 12 have ended in spanish victories, giving the teenager a flawless 12-0 record whenever he has been selected from the opening whistle. It is the best 100 percent winning record ever recorded by a european player when starting matches.

Article Title: "That's difficult for me...": Kylian Mbappé's girlfriend Ester Expósito breaks silence on the tough World Cup choice she had to make
Article Text:
The French star player Kylian Mbappé has been a force to be reckoned with on the field, impressing everyone around the world. While his record breaking performance has impressed billions across the world, his high profile relationship with Spanish actress Ester Expósito has turned heads. As the star player plays against the nation of his girlfriend, Ester Expósito has opened up about it.

Kylian Mbappé’s girlfriend Ester Expósito opens up about the difficult choice she had to make during the 2026 World Cup



Kylian Mbappé opened up about the passion the french team had for the 2026 World Cup



The French star player Kylian Mbappé has been a force to be reckoned with on the field. While his record breaking performance has impressed billions across the world, his high profile relationship with Spanish actress Ester Expósito has turned heads. As the star player plays against the nation of his girlfriend, Ester Expósito has opened up about it.Kylian Mbappé A few weeks ago, as the popular actress Ester Expósito turned heads at the Monte-Carlo TV Festival, she opened up about who she would be supporting in the 2026 World Cup.In an interview with the New York Post, Kylian Mbappé’s girlfriend, Ester Expósito, said, “Oh, no! That’s a difficult choice for me… Who knows?”Both the Real Madrid star player Kylian Mbappé and the popular Spanish actress Ester Expósito have been strictly private about their high profile relationship even though the two have often been spotted in public.Last month, before the 2026 World Cup began, many criticised the Real Madrid star player Kylian Mbappé for going on lavish vacations in Ibiza and Paris with his girlfriend.Despite the trolling, Kylian Mbappé and his girlfriend, Ester Expósito have remained distant from all the drama concerning their relationship as he kept his focus on the World Cup.Kylian Mbappé’ recorded an impressive performance on the field with 8 goals and providing 3 assists in 6 matches.A few days ago, in a heartfelt interview with French magazine Gazeta, the star player Kylian Mbappé’ opened up about his team.The French captain said, “We are aware of our potential. But what we are demonstrating here is more important. It's not the opponents' fear that makes you win. Those are just feelings. We still have a lot to prove before we are considered invincible and deserve all the other superlatives you give us."The Real Madrid star forward aded, “The passion to represent France, and to play in a World Cup in this shirt. There's nothing stronger. Within the squad, we are perfectly aware of this and try to teach it to the younger players too. We are a team and a country with an important history in the World Cup.”He continued, “The youngsters need to know this and understand what it means to handle the pressure of playing for France."While there have been many speculations about his whirlwind romance, Kylian Mbappé’ has kept the focus on his career as he has refused to address the romance rumors in public during the 2026 World Cup.
Article Summary: Kylian mbappé’s girlfriend ester expósito opens up about the difficult choice she had to make during the 2026 world cup. The french star player has been a force to be reckoned with on the field, impressing everyone around the world.

Article Title: Fortnite Odyssey Cup: How to register, date, and free skins
Article Text:
Image via Fortnite

Everything you need to know about Fortnite Odyssey Cup



Odyssey Cup date and time



How to register for The Odyssey Cup



All free rewards in Fortnite Odyssey Cup



Reward Requirement Odysseus (Outfit) Top placement by region Odysseus' Xiphos (Pickaxe) Top placement by region Bow of Iphytus (Back Bling) Top placement by region King's Helm (Spray) 40 points The Trojan War (Loading Screen) 8 points

Odysseus skin in Fortnite Item Shop



Christopher Nolan’s highly anticipated film adaptation of Homer’s The Odyssey is hitting theatres on July 17, 2026, and Epic Games is celebrating in style. The Odyssey crossover is officially coming to Fortnite, bringing Matt Damon’s take on the legendary hero Odysseus to the Battle Royale island.Before the official introduction of the skin, Epic Games is providing you with the opportunity to get your hands on it for completely free. They are organizing the Odyssey Cup, participating in which could get you a variety of cosmetics.In the section below, we take a detailed look at the upcoming Odyssey Cup in Fortnite.The Odyssey Cup is a limited-time competitive event in Fortnite that gives you the opportunity to earn the Odysseus skin and other themed cosmetics without spending any V-Bucks. It follows the same format as previous free-skin competitive cups in Fortnite, where you must rank high enough in their region to claim the rewards.The cup is available in both Battle Royale and Zero Build modes, and Epic is also running a dedicated Mobile variant in the Reload mode, meaning iPhone and iPad players returning to Fortnite through the iOS App Store can also participate.The Odyssey Cup takes place across July 15–16, 2026. You can find the full schedule and registration details inside the in-game Compete tab, where the exact session times for each region and game mode are listed.Registering for The Odyssey Cup requires no additional sign-up outside of Fortnite itself. Simply open the game, navigate to the Compete tab from the lobby, and select The Odyssey Cup from the list of active tournaments. From there, you can view your region's session times and join a match during the active window. Two-factor authentication must be enabled on your Epic Games account before you can participate in any competitive Fortnite event.Here is everything players can earn from The Odyssey Cup and the placement or point requirements needed to unlock each reward:The exact number of qualifying placements varies by region. In Europe, the top 1,000 players earn the skin, while in NA Central it is the top 700, NA West top 200, Brazil top 200, and Oceania, Asia, and Middle East each have a top 100 threshold. The Mobile Cup has a smaller qualifying pool across all regions.If you do not end up ranking high enough during the cup window, the Odysseus skin is expected to arrive in the Fortnite Item Shop on July 17, 2026, at 8 PM ET. This is perfectly timed, given that it is the theatrical release of the film on the same day.This was all you needed to know about The Odyssey Cup in Fortnite.
Article Summary: Odysseus skin is expected to arrive in the fortnite item shop on july 17, 2026, at 8 pm et. Epic games is organizing the odyssey cup, participating in which could get you a variety of cosmetics. The cup is available in both battle royale and zero build modes.

Article Title: Who is Charles Snowden? Cowboys star suspended for first three games of 2026 NFL season following DUI case
Article Text:
Who is Charles Snowden? Cowboys star suspended for first three games of 2026 NFL season following DUI case(Getty Images)



Who is Charles Snowden?

Why was Charles Snowden suspended?

Dallas Cowboys defensive end Charles Snowden will begin the 2026 NFL season with a three-game suspension after the NFL disciplined him following the resolution of his 2024 DUI case. The league announced the suspension through its official transactions wire on Tuesday, and an NFL spokesperson confirmed to Fox News Digital that the punishment stemmed from Snowden's DUI arrest while he was with the Las Vegas Raiders.Snowden is still eligible to participate in the Cowboys' training camp and all three preseason games. His suspension will take effect after the NFL's final 53-man roster deadline, forcing him to miss Dallas' regular-season opener against the New York Giants, followed by games against the Washington Commanders and Baltimore Ravens. As of now, the Dallas Cowboys have not publicly commented on the NFL's decision.Charles Snowden is a 28-year-old defensive end who currently plays for the Dallas Cowboys. A native of Silver Spring, Maryland, he starred at the University of Virginia, where he developed into one of the ACC's top pass rushers.His father is Chuck Snowden. Chuck Snowden, along with his wife Terri, raised Charles in Silver Spring, Maryland, and supported his athletic journey from Blake High School through his college career at the University of Virginia.In his senior season in 2020, Snowden led the Cavaliers with six sacks and 10 tackles for loss before earning second-team All-ACC honors despite suffering a season-ending ankle injury.After going undrafted in the 2021 NFL Draft, Snowden signed with the Chicago Bears as a free agent. He later spent time with the Tampa Bay Buccaneers before joining the Las Vegas Raiders, where he earned the most significant playing time of his NFL career.The 2025 season proved to be Snowden's breakthrough campaign. He appeared in 15 games, making nine starts, and recorded career highs with three sacks, 28 total tackles and five tackles for loss. He also intercepted the first pass of his NFL career. Across 33 career games, Snowden has totaled 4.5 sacks, 28 tackles and one interception.Although he re-signed with the Raiders in April 2026, Las Vegas released him less than a month later. The Cowboys signed Snowden on June 18 after he impressed the coaching staff during a minicamp tryout, adding experienced depth to their pass-rushing unit.Charles Snowden's suspension stems from a DUI arrest in Las Vegas on December 9, 2024. In January 2026, he pleaded no contest to a misdemeanor DUI charge as part of a plea agreement. Under the agreement, he was ordered to pay a $1,000 fine and complete DUI and coroner's education courses. If he fulfills those requirements, the misdemeanor DUI charge will be reduced to reckless driving.Although the NFL's transactions wire did not specify the reason for the suspension, an NFL spokesperson confirmed it was related to Snowden's resolved DUI case. Under the league's Personal Conduct Policy, discipline is often imposed after legal proceedings have concluded.The suspension delays Charles Snowden's Cowboys debut in meaningful games. Still, he will be available throughout training camp and the preseason before becoming eligible to return after serving the three-game ban at the start of the regular season.
Article Summary: Charles snowden is a 28-year-old defensive end who currently plays for the dallas cowboys. His suspension stems from a dui arrest in las vegas on december 9, 2024. In january 2026, he pleaded no contest to a misdemeanor dui charge as part of a plea agreement. He was ordered to pay a $1,000 fine and complete dui and coroner's education courses.

Article Title: Shubman Gill's India ends England's 12-year home stronghold at Edgbaston with six-wicket win
Article Text:
India end England's 12-year old streak (Image: BCCI)

Date Opponent Result September 2, 2014 India Lost by 9 wickets June 9, 2015 New Zealand Won by 210 runs June 24, 2016 Sri Lanka Won by 10 wickets June 10, 2017 Australia Won by 40 runs (DLS) June 30, 2019 India Won by 31 runs July 11, 2019 Australia Won by 8 wickets July 13, 2021 Pakistan Won by 3 wickets May 29, 2025 West Indies Won by 238 runs July 14, 2026 India Lost by 6 wickets

England's collapse after strong start



India complete comfortable chase



India brought an end to England's remarkable 12-year unbeaten run in Men's ODIs at Edgbaston with a convincing six-wicket victory on 1st ODI.India entered the ODI series on the back of a disappointing 4-0 T20I series defeat and were determined to bounce back. The visitors responded in emphatic fashion, ending England's long-standing winning streak at their home ground. England had remained unbeaten in seven consecutive Men's ODIs at Edgbaston since 2015. The last team to defeat them in a 50-over international at the Birmingham venue was also India, who registered a comprehensive nine-wicket victory on September 2, 2014.Adding to the win, India registered their sixth consecutive ODI victory over England, setting a new record for their longest winning streak against the Three Lions. Their previous best was five successive wins, a feat they had achieved on three separate occasions.The hosts made a promising start, reaching 61 without loss, before India's bowlers triggered a dramatic collapse that left them reeling at 80/5. Joe Root held the innings together with an unbeaten 76, while Liam Dawson added a valuable 68. Their 111-run partnership helped England recover to 258 before they were bowled out. Axar Patel played a pivotal role with the ball, claiming four wickets and breaking the backbone of England's batting line-up with figures of 4/62.India's pursuit was built around another assured knock from captain Shubman Gill , who scored 80 before retiring hurt with cramps. The visitors briefly lost momentum after slipping to 160/4, but Axar Patel and Washington Sundar combined to extinguish England's hopes. The pair stitched together an unbeaten 102-run stand, with Axar finishing on 57* and Sundar remaining unbeaten on 52, as India sealed victory with 28 deliveries remaining.Also this is only the second instance of India successfully chasing down a 250+ target in ODIs since 2016 where either Rohit or Kohli failed to get to 50; the other instance came against England at Old Trafford in 2022 when they chased down 260, with both Rohit & Kohli scoring 17 runs each.
Article Summary: England had remained unbeaten in seven consecutive men's odis at edgbaston since 2015. Last team to defeat them in a 50-over international at the birmingham venue was also india, who registered a comprehensive nine-wicket victory on september 2, 2014.

Article Title: Who are Michael Olise’s parents? All about Vincent and Mina Olise
Article Text:
Who are Michael Olise's parents (Getty Images)

Who is Mina Olise and why did she influence Michael's decision to play for France?

Who is Vincent Olise and what did he do before Michael's football career?

Does Michael Olise have a sibling and who introduced him to chess?

Michael Olise is one of the more compelling stories at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Not just for what he does on the ball, but for the background he carries into every match. Born in England to a Nigerian father and a Franco-Algerian mother, Olise had four countries he could have played for internationally. He chose France, the nation his mother, Mina, comes from. That decision didn't happen in isolation. It was shaped by two parents who gave him a world in miniature before he ever set foot on a professional pitch.Mina is French, and that connection was never just a line on a passport. Olise has said that growing up, his household ran on two languages at once. His father, Vincent, spoke English with him, while Mina spoke French. Michael answered both in English but stayed equally at home in French. The family made regular trips to Algeria, Nigeria, and France, so none of these identities felt distant or theoretical to him.When he joined the French national team in 2024, he was candid about the pull he felt toward his mother's country. "My mother is from France. When I was little, I went to France. I had this connection with France. I'm proud to be here," he told reporters.For Olise, picking France wasn't about picking the most convenient option. It was personal.Michael's father, Vincent, has his own sporting biography. He represented Nigeria's national cricket team from 1983 to 1990 and continued playing at club level well beyond that. He operated as an opening batsman and specialist fielder, and as of 2020, he held the joint record for 10 wickets in a single innings.Michael has cited cricket as one of the games he genuinely loves, and the sport makes regular appearances when he talks about his hobbies. Alongside chess and ping-pong, cricket connects him to his father's world in a way football never quite does. "We never talk about football, to be honest. We are both in it so much. We talk about life," he told Highsnobiety in June 2026.It's a telling detail. Vincent passed down a competitive instinct to his son but didn't confine it to one sport.Michael has a younger brother, Richard Olise, who was on Chelsea FC's books before a recent release. The two are close enough to be competitive off the pitch. Michael has been open about the fact that he absolutely hates losing to Richard. "I never want to lose to my little brother. Or my mom," he said. That competitive edge with family is familiar to anyone who's grown up with siblings, and it humanises an otherwise composed footballer who rarely shows much emotion during a game.The chess detail is worth noting on its own. Mina introduced Michael to the game when he was young, and he's kept at it, currently playing at a rating between 1300 and 1400. It fits with how he speaks about challenges in general. "When you have a setback, take it as a lesson. Use it as time to grow," he told Highsnobiety. That kind of thinking doesn't emerge from nowhere. For Olise, it seems to have started at home.
Article Summary: Michael olise was born in england to a nigerian father and a franco-algerian mother. He chose france, the nation his mother, mina, comes from. The family made regular trips to algeria, nigeria, and france. His father, vincent, represented nigeria's national cricket team from 1983 to 1990.

Article Title: Watch: Riots erupt in France after 0-2 FIFA World Cup semifinal loss to Spain
Article Text:
Riots erupt in France (Image: X)

Spain outclass France to book World Cup final berth



France erupts

What's next for France?

France's 2026 FIFA World Cup dream came to a heartbreaking end after a 2-0 defeat to Spain in the semifinal at AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas, on Tuesday. However, after the loss the riots are triggered as videos are widely circulated on social media.Spain produced a composed display to end France's campaign and secure a place in the FIFA World Cup 2026 final. La Roja struck twice to seal a 2-0 victory, frustrating Didier Deschamps' side, who struggled to create clear-cut chances despite boasting attacking stars such as Kylian Mbappé.The defeat left French fans devastated as hopes of lifting a third World Cup title came to an end. Much of the post-match discussion among supporters centered on France's lack of attacking cohesion, Mbappé's subdued display, and the penalty conceded in the opening half.France descended into unrest following 2-0 defeat to Spain in the FIFA World Cup 2026 semifinal. The final whistle in Arlington, Texas, was followed by riots in parts of the French capital, with chaotic scenes unfolding on the streets.Instead of heading to the final in New Jersey, Didier Deschamps' squad must now regroup for the third-place playoff match this Saturday, July 18, 2026, where they will face the loser of the second semifinal match.The French skipper said Spain's midfield was given too much freedom, allowing La Roja to dominate possession and take control of the contest."That's what we let them do. We let the midfield too much time to play and they have the quality to play. It's difficult when you don't change the plan of Spain. The penalty helped (them) also to come in the game and then they scored the second goal and we didn't have the quality to get to the final," Mbappe added.Mbappe also accepted responsibility for the defeat, saying criticism comes with the role of captain."You take all the glory when you win, when you don't win but you have to take the blame. It's part of my game, my life, and as captain I have to take all the responsibility. We wanted to go to the final, we didn't and we have to take what people say to us," he said.
Article Summary: France's 2026 fifa world cup dream came to a heartbreaking end after a 2-0 defeat to spain in the semifinal at at&t stadium in arlington, texas, on tuesday. The final whistle was followed by riots in parts of the french capital, with chaotic scenes unfolding on the streets.

Article Title: Watch: Rohit Sharma's 'nataraja shot' leaves Dinesh Karthik in awe during 1st ODI vs England
Article Text:
Rohit Sharm' shot

Rohit Sharma's 'nataraja shot' leaves Dinesh Karthik in awe

India continued their dominance over England in ODI cricket, registering a sixth consecutive victory over the hosts to take a 1-0 lead in the three-match series. The visitors chased down 259 with 28 balls to spare, ending England's 12-year unbeaten run at Edgbaston in the format.While India's clinical victory grabbed the headlines, one stroke from Rohit Sharma early in the chase stole the spotlight. The veteran opener produced a trademark pull shot off Jofra Archer that left fans and commentators in awe.England had elected to bat first after winning the toss at their fortress, Edgbaston, where they had remained unbeaten in Men's ODIs since 2014. However, India's disciplined bowling restricted the hosts to 258 before the visitors completed the chase comfortably.The moment came in the sixth over of India's innings. Archer banged one in short, but Rohit was quick to read the length. He swivelled into position and dispatched the ball over square leg for a sublime boundary. The elegance of the stroke prompted commentator Dinesh Karthik to compare it to Rohit's iconic 'Nataraja Shot'a nickname inspired by the legendary pose of Lord Nataraja. As Rohit balanced on one leg after executing the pull to perfection.India brought an end to England's remarkable 12-year unbeaten run in Men's ODIs at Edgbaston with a convincing six-wicket victory on 1st ODI. The hosts made a promising start, reaching 61 without loss, before India's bowlers triggered a dramatic collapse that left them reeling at 80/5. Joe Root held the innings together with an unbeaten 76, while Liam Dawson added a valuable 68. Their 111-run partnership helped England recover to 258 before they were bowled out.Axar Patel played a pivotal role with the ball, claiming four wickets and breaking the backbone of England's batting line-up with figures of 4/62.India's pursuit was built around another assured knock from captain Shubman Gill, who scored 80 before retiring hurt with cramps. The visitors briefly lost momentum after slipping to 160/4, but Axar Patel and Washington Sundar combined to extinguish England's hopes. The pair stitched together an unbeaten 102-run stand, with Axar finishing on 57* and Sundar remaining unbeaten on 52, as India sealed victory with 28 deliveries remaining.
Article Summary: India beat england by six wickets to take 1-0 lead in three-match series. Rohit sharma's 'nataraja shot' leaves dinesh karthik in awe. England's 12-year unbeaten run at edgbaston came to an end.

Article Title: Is iShowSpeed performing at the 2026 FIFA World Cup final? Here’s what the latest announcement reveals
Article Text:
iShowSpeed (Image Via Getty)

IShowSpeed joins FIFA World Cup final entertainment lineup

Why iShowSpeed’s FIFA World Cup final performance stands out

iShowSpeed is set to take part in one of football’s biggest events. A post shared by ClippedSZN announced that the YouTube star will perform during the opening ceremony of the 2026 FIFA World Cup Final. The event will take place before the final match at New York New Jersey Stadium, with FIFA also confirming a star-filled entertainment lineup that includes Tom Cruise , Laura Pausini, Nicole Scherzinger, Robbie Williams and Jennifer Hudson . As of now, iShowSpeed has not publicly responded to the announcement. ClippedSZN first shared the news, while FIFA later confirmed the official ceremony lineup.Darren Watkins Jr., better known as iShowSpeed, has become one of the biggest internet personalities in the world.While he first built his audience through gaming and livestreams, football has become a huge part of his content over the last few years.He regularly travels to major matches, meets top players, takes part in football challenges and shares his reactions with millions of followers.That strong connection with the sport makes this invitation different from a regular celebrity appearance.Instead of choosing only singers and actors, FIFA has added one of the internet’s biggest creators to its pre-match show.According to FIFA, the opening ceremony will feature Tom Cruise, Laura Pausini, Nicole Scherzinger, Robbie Williams and iShowSpeed, while Jennifer Hudson will perform the United States national anthem before kickoff.The World Cup final is scheduled for July 19 at New York New Jersey Stadium. It is expected to be one of the most watched sporting events in the world, making it the biggest live audience iShowSpeed has ever performed in front of.FIFA has also confirmed that the tournament final will include the competition’s first-ever halftime show, produced with Global Citizen and curated by Coldplay frontman Chris Martin.For years, World Cup ceremonies have mostly featured global music stars. This time, FIFA is also bringing internet culture onto its biggest stage.iShowSpeed’s popularity comes from livestreams, football content and his energetic personality, making him one of the few creators to cross from online entertainment into a major FIFA event.The announcement also reflects how much his football content has grown. From meeting some of the game’s biggest stars to playing in creator football events, he has built a strong connection with fans who follow both football and online creators.Even though ClippedSZN shared the news first, FIFA’s official announcement confirmed that iShowSpeed is part of the opening ceremony lineup.More details about what he will perform or how long he will appear have not been announced yet. His own reaction is also still awaited, leaving fans eager to see what role he will play on football’s biggest night.
Article Summary: Ishowspeed will take part in the opening ceremony of the 2026 fifa world cup final. The youtube star will perform before the final match at new york new jersey stadium. Fifa also confirmed a star-filled entertainment lineup that includes tom cruise, laura pausini, nicole scherzinger, robbie williams and jennifer hudson.

Article Title: Fortnite Hot Bat Summer: DC Summer Event release date, skins, and more
Article Text:
Image via Fortnite

Fortnite DC Hot Bat Summer release date



All DC Hot Bat Summer skins and cosmetics



Batman Sprite in Fortnite



Fortnite DC Hot Bat Summer quests



Epic Games has officially announced the Fortnite DC Hot Bat Summer event, and it is only a few days away. It will arrive on July 16, 2026, as Act 2 of Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 3, bringing a wave of summer-themed cosmetics, a brand-new Sprite, and a fresh set of event quests.After weeks of leaks, the confirmation has provided the fans with massive relief. In the section below, we take a detailed look at the upcoming Fortnite DC Summer Event.The Fortnite DC Hot Bat Summer event is going to commence on July 16, 2026, following the game’s upcoming v41.20 update. As with all other patches, the game will enter downtime around 4 AM ET, during which you will not be able to access any game modes.After the servers return, Epic Games will introduce the DC Summer event in Fortnite, and you will find all the new content.The headlining draw is a full roster of summer outfit variants for some of DC's most iconic characters. The DC Hot Bat Summer event brings new summer-style skins for Summer Batman, Summer Harley Quinn, Summer Catwoman, and Summer Poison Ivy.All four characters already possess skins in Fortnite, and these new variants will end up providing them with a distinctive look in the battle royale experience. Beyond the outfits, the event will also introduce the Batman Sprite, which is among the most-awaited variants.The update will also feature the Ace the Bat-Hound as a Fortnite Sidekick. A new Dune Buggy-inspired Batmobile is further confirmed.You will be able to get all of these items directly via the Fortnite Item Shop after the event goes live.As already mentioned, the Hot Bat Summer event introduces the Batman Sprite, which is going to be a themed Sprite. The exact ability of the Batman Sprite is yet to be confirmed, but you can expect it to feature something unique.The Batman Sprite will have four different variants in the form of Gold, Gummy, Galaxy, and Holofoil. Collecting them will provide you with special buffs.The final thing that the Fortnite DC Hot Bat Summer event will introduce would be special quests. As part of them, you will be able to get XP towards the Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 3 Battle Pass. It could also end up providing you with a free skin or other cosmetics.Epic has a track record of including quest-based free rewards in major crossover events, so keeping an eye on the quest tab when the v41.20 update drops is well worth doing.With Summer Batman, Ace, the Dune Buggy Batmobile, and a full Batman Sprite set all landing at once, the DC Hot Bat Summer event is shaping up to be one of Chapter 7 Season 3's biggest weeks.This was all you needed to know about Fortnite’s upcoming update.
Article Summary: The fortnite dc hot bat summer event is going to commence on july 16, 2026. The update will also feature the ace the bat-hound as a sidekick. The batman sprite will have four different variants in the form of gold, gummy, galaxy, and holofoil. Collecting them will provide you with special buffs.

Article Title: Las Vegas Raiders Free Agency Rumors: NFL analyst Mina Kimes urges Tom Brady’s team to pursue New England Patriots $27M wide receiver
Article Text:
Las Vegas Raiders Trade Rumors: ESPN NFL analyst Mina Kimes urges Tom Brady’s franchise to pursue New England Patriots $27M wide receiver (Image 1 via X, Image 2 via Getty: Las Vegas Raiders logo and New England Patriots logo)

Stefon Diggs would be an upgrade for Las Vegas Raiders, Washington Commanders or Kansas City Chiefs

Stefon Diggs free agency rumors

Category Details Player Stefon Diggs Current Team None. He was released by the New England Patriots in March 2026. Rumored Teams Kansas City Chiefs, Las Vegas Raiders, Baltimore Ravens, Washington Commanders, and Tennessee Titans. Contract Status UFA [unrestricted free agent] Spotrac Calculated Market Value Two years, $27 million contract with $13 million average annual salary Free Agency Signing Likelihood Moderate to High Latest Insider Update ESPN insider Jeremy Fowler

ESPN insider Jeremy Fowler links Stefon Diggs to Washington Commanders and Baltimore Ravens

ESPN NFL analyst Mina Kimes has been actively pitching Stefon Diggs to the Tom Brady-part-owned Las Vegas Raiders over the past few months.In May, Kimes said that the Raiders’ receiving group is “pretty thin.”And when a young quarterback like Fernando Mendoza starts, “it would really help him to have a receiver like Diggs, who he can rely on in those situations.”Like, Diggs helped Drake Maye in the New England Patriots? Maybe.Then, in June, another ESPN NFL analyst Aaron Schatz picked Diggs for Las Vegas, citing the Raiders’ receiver depth as severely lacking.Diggs was still good enough to finish second among wideouts last season in ESPN Analytics’ receiver room. Diggs for the Raiders seems like a “no-brainer.”Then, in July, Mina Kimes again pitched for the 32-year-old veteran WR, saying,“When I look at teams across the NFL like Las Vegas and their wide receiver group, Washington, or Kansas City, to name a few, I absolutely think they should be on the phone about Stefon Diggs because he would be an upgrade for them.”What else did the analyst say? Let’s find out.On the July 13 episode of NFL Live, Mina Kimes discussed how Stefon Diggs would be an upgrade for several teams, such as the Las Vegas Raiders, Washington Commanders, and Kansas City Chiefs, based solely on his 2025 performance.He recorded 85 receptions on 100 targets for 1,013 receiving yards, 4 touchdowns, and an average of 11.9 yards per catch.He earned an 87.5 overall PFF [Pro Football Focus] grade, which ranked him 6th among 81 qualified wide receivers.The ESPN NFL analyst further said Diggs had an 83 percent catch rate; he led all the receivers. He was third in yards per route.He may not have as much juice left in him at 32 as he did in his prime, but “he is still an exceptional route runner.”And as evidenced by the catch rate, he has elite hands.ESPN insider Jeremy Fowler reported he is hearing Stefon Diggs will have a market closer to training camp.At least five teams that need wide receiver help have checked in on him.Of those, two are the Washington Commanders and the Baltimore Ravens. All the interested teams have to do is “deal with some of the baggage and headlines.”But ESPN insider Jeremy Fowler says Diggs is confident because he recorded 1,000-plus receiving yards last season.He was playing on a snap count of around 55 percent, coming off an ACL injury he suffered on October 27, 2024. He managed a 1,000-plus season after the ACL tear.He is confident this time because he feels he will be even better. What is better than a 1000-plus-yard season? [add a shocking emoji here].Anyhow, ESPN insider Jeremy Fowler said he was looking at the Washington Commanders because that’s where Stefon Diggs is from.The Washington Commanders are looking for more of a speed option at this point. There are several veterans they could consider. And one of them is Diggs.
Article Summary: Espn nfl analyst mina kimes has been actively pitching stefon diggs to the tom brady-part-owned las vegas raiders over the past few months. Diggs was still good enough to finish second among wideouts last season in espn analytics’ receiver room. At least five teams that need wide receiver help have checked in on him.

Article Title: NHL trade rumor: Edmonton Oilers linked to three-time Stanley Cup champion Patrick Kane in free agency
Article Text:
Patrick Kane named as an option for the Edmonton Oilers (Image via: Getty Images)

Edmonton Oilers identified as potential landing spots for veteran winger Patrick Kane

The Edmonton Oilers have been identified as a potential landing spot for veteran winger Patrick Kane as the franchise is planning to strengthen its roster ahead of the 2026-27 NHL season. Speculation is doing the rounds that the Edmonton Oilers are among the best fits for the three-time Stanley Cup Champion, owing to the Oilers' championship aspirations and Kane's proven offensive game. Previously, the Detroit Red Wings tried to convince Kane to stay by offering him a contract or presenting reasons to remain with the team. However, it appears he has decided to move on and is likely to sign with a fourth NHL franchise.As recent speculation suggests, the Edmonton Oilers identified a potential landing spot for veteran winger Patrick Kane . It is important to note that Patrick Kane is an Unrestricted Free Agent, and his last contract was 1 year, $3,000,000 with a cap hit of $3,000,000 per season. His contract expired at the end of the 2025-26 season.Latest reports suggest that the Detroit Red Wings tried to convince Kane to stay by offering him a contract with the team.However, it appears he has decided to move on and is likely to sign with a fourth NHL franchise with the Buffalo Sabres. It is to be noted that the Buffalo Sabres are his hometown club.Not only that, but even the Toronto Maple Leafs are also planning to consider him for their team, but reports suggest that the talks are still at a very early stage.Kane has been a reliable veteran player for the Detroit Red Wings since joining the club in the 2023-24 season. Though injuries limited him to 67 games this season, he still had 57 points with 16 goals and 41 assists in 67 games, to finish fifth among their leading scorers the previous season.Amid the offseason, the Edmonton Oilers have already improved their roster somewhat, but they still have enough salary cap space to make another significant signing that could make the team even stronger.After defenseman Darnell Nurse left the team, Edmonton has signed or acquired players such as Mathieu Joseph and Ryan Shea. These are viewed as useful but not blockbuster additions. Despite these additions, reports suggest the club is still left with enough cap space to make one or two more interesting acquisitions, such as signing a veteran free agent like Patrick Kane or making a trade.Meanwhile, Kane is also widely expected to be inducted into the Hockey Hall of Fame as soon as he becomes eligible. Not only this, but Kane has also won the Hart Trophy, Conn Smythe Trophy, and Art Ross Trophy during his illustrious career.His championship experience has made him an attractive option for contenders despite entering the latter stages of his career. Despite his age, he is still an effective player and can strengthen a team's power play with his playmaking ability.Although no agreement has been reported, Kane continues to draw interest from several teams, and Edmonton could emerge as one of the strongest contenders if it decides to pursue the NHL star.
Article Summary: Edmonton oilers identified as potential landing spot for veteran winger patrick kane. Speculation is doing the rounds that the edmonton oilers are among the best fits for the three-time stanley cup champion. The detroit red wings tried to convince kane to stay by offering him a contract or presenting reasons to remain with the team.

Article Title: Minor in CWG squad: Para cyclist Lisha Das raises safety concerns over no woman support staff
Article Text:
Lisha Das (Pic credit: NVS India)

NEW DELHI: India’s Commonwealth Games (CWG) contingent has come under scrutiny after the youngest member of the 191-strong squad, 16-year-old para track cyclist Lisha Das expressed “profound disappointment” over the absence of a woman coach or support staff in the track and para track cycling contingent, raising safety and security concerns for a minor athlete travelling overseas.In emails to the sports authorities, Lisha wrote: “I am writing this email with profound disappointment… I am a minor female para athlete. I required a female escort and medical support professional. We submitted the parental consent form naming Asha Shaikh, my physiotherapist, as my accompanying support personnel... Proper coaching, medical support, athlete safety and athlete welfare should have been the highest priority. ”"Despite several representations from my parents, my coach, and me, this issue remains unresolved, while responsibility continues to be shifted between organizations. It is extremely unfortunate that the athlete continues to suffer while authorities engage in a blame game. One of the most disappointing aspects of this entire episode is the continuous shifting of responsibility. Whenever issues arise: CFI states that it is PCI’s responsibility.PCI states that it is CFI’s responsibility. Neither I nor my parents should be held responsible for this administrative failure,” she added.The CWG contingent, cleared by the sports ministry on July 9, comprises 126 athletes, 51 officials and 14 contingent staff. While every other discipline has at least one woman coach, physiotherapist or medical staff member, cycling and para cycling are the only disciplines without female support personnel.The omission appears inconsistent with the Sports Authority of India’s June 15, 2022 circular mandating a woman coach in contingents with female athletes during domestic and international camps and competitions, besides appointing male and female compliance officers to safeguard women athletes.Four years ago, when the country’s sports administration was rocked by two harassment complaints by female athletes in cycling and sailing disciplines against their respective coaches, the Sports Authority of India (SAI) had come up with an office circular on June 15, 2022, with a view to keep the sport safe and free of harassment and discrimination for women athletes.“Women coach to mandatorily be a part of the contingent with female athletes during domestic/international camps and competition exposures; and compliance officer (male & female) to be appointed in all national coaching camps and foreign exposures,” read the SAI’s office order.It may be recalled that the Indian cricket board (BCCI) recently allowed 15-year-old batter Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s parents to accompany him on India’s tour of Ireland and England, with expenses borne by the board to ensure compliance with child safeguarding norms and ease his transition into a senior environment.The four-member support staff accompanying the cycling contingent comprises male coach Kevin Rene Michel Sireau, male physiotherapist Prahlad Priyadarshi, male technician Rahul Nagappan Assari and male para cycling coach Dattatraya Katkam.However, in a late development, Lisha’s long-time coach Aditya Jitendra Kumar Mehta has “substituted” Dattatreya in the official contingent. Dattatreya currently is a Cycling Federation of India (CFI) office-bearer and can only travel at ‘no cost to govt’ following a ministry’s recent directive on NSF officials travelling with the CWG-bound contingent.However, Lisha’s key demands remain unmet: appointment of a woman coach or support staff, inclusion of physiotherapist Asha, and a technician to assemble and maintain her specialised racing bicycle.
Article Summary: Para track cyclist lisha das expressed “profound disappointment’ over the absence of a woman coach or support staff in the track and para track cycling contingent. The cwg contingent comprises 126 athletes, 51 officials and 14 contingent staff. Every other discipline has at least one woman coach, physiotherapist or medical staff member.

Article Title: Who is Ismail Elfath? Everything to know about the England vs Argentina World Cup semifinal referee
Article Text:
Ismail Elfath (Image Via Getty)

Ismail Elfath brings years of experience to England vs Argentina World Cup semifinal

Why Ismail Elfath’s appointment has become a talking point before England vs Argentina

The 2026 FIFA World Cup semifinal between England and Argentina will have another key figure besides the players. FIFA has appointed American referee Ismail Elfath to take charge of the high-pressure clash in Atlanta. While Elfath is one of FIFA’s most experienced officials, his selection has drawn extra attention because refereeing decisions in Argentina’s recent World Cup matches have already sparked debate. That means every decision he makes on Wednesday will be watched closely.Ismail Elfath is no stranger to football’s biggest stage. Born in Morocco, he moved to the United States as a teenager and later became a FIFA-listed referee in 2016 after building his career in Major League Soccer.Before becoming a full-time referee, he earned a mechanical engineering degree from the University of Texas.The England vs Argentina match will be his fourth game at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Earlier in the tournament, he officiated Netherlands vs Japan, Brazil vs Norway, and Uruguay vs Spain.The Uruguay-Spain match was especially physical, and Elfath sent off Uruguay’s Agustín Canobbio after a tough challenge.His World Cup experience goes back to Qatar in 2022, where he handled several matches and was also the fourth official for the unforgettable final between Argentina and France.FIFA has again shown its trust in him by giving him one of the biggest matches of this tournament.Another milestone comes with this appointment. For the first time in World Cup history, two referees from CONCACAF have been chosen to officiate the tournament’s two semifinal matches.Elfath himself has not been at the center of the biggest refereeing controversies in this World Cup.However, he steps into a match that already carries plenty of pressure because Argentina’s victories over Egypt and Switzerland led to strong reactions over several officiating decisions.Fans, former players, and media outlets questioned some of those calls, keeping referees under heavy scrutiny ahead of the semifinal.His appointment has also become a topic because Lionel Messi has never lost a match officiated by Elfath since joining Inter Miami, while the American official was also the fourth referee during Argentina’s 2022 World Cup final win.Some supporters have pointed to that record, although FIFA’s refereeing chief, Pierluigi Collina, has defended the integrity and independence of match officials.With one of football’s oldest rivalries returning to the World Cup stage, Elfath will have little room for error. Every foul, booking, penalty appeal and VAR decision is likely to be examined, making his performance almost as important as the football itself.
Article Summary: Ismail elfath will referee england vs argentina in the 2026 world cup semifinal. The american referee is one of fifa's most experienced officials. His appointment has drawn extra attention because refereeing decisions in argentina’s recent world cup matches have already sparked debate.
